text:
3. First “ever” date for beneficiaries with IHD in both MBSF Chronic Conditions files in 2017 

• Among the beneficiaries with an IHD “ever” date in both files, 80% have an MBSF_CC_2017 “ever” date between 
1999–2015. This mainly explains 96.2% of the differences observed between “ever” dates in the two files (Table 3) 
o Additional differences in the “ever” dates for IHD between the files are that 299,700 beneficiaries had a date 
in 2016 or 2017, yet the date was earlier in the MBSF_CC_2017
